title: Death or Deathtrue2
wikitext:
[]: Death or Death(true)^2 ?             Quote Post by reina » Thu Dec 14, 2006 11:06 pm Which is more worth watching? From my understanding Death(true)^2 is the "final version" of Death, but on the other hand doesn't Death (the original that came with Rebirth) have more content since things were cut out to be put in the director's cut?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Dec 15, 2006 12:08 am I doubt many people care enough about he Death program to even bother knowing the differences between the three edits. I'm content with Death True^2 on my manga DVD. However, I would like to watch Death and Death True at some point, just to know the difference.

Article: Death or Deathtrue2 
[]: Death or Death(true)^2 ?             Quote Post by reina » Thu Dec 14, 2006 11:06 pm Which is more worth watching? From my understanding Death(true)^2 is the "final version" of Death, but on the other hand doesn't Death (the original that came with Rebirth) have more content since things were cut out to be put in the director's cut?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Dec 15, 2006 12:08 am I doubt many people care enough about he Death program to even bother knowing the differences between the three edits. I'm content with Death True^2 on my manga DVD. However, I would like to watch Death and Death True at some point, just to know the difference.
